# 🤖 Robotics & AI Journey

A structured 12-month self-study roadmap toward publishing original robotics research and building expertise in the NVIDIA ecosystem — by a third-year Robotics & AI undergraduate.

**Goal:** Publish at ICRA/IROS → Work at NVIDIA → Found a RaaS startup

📓 [View my daily dev log →](./DEVLOG.md)
---

## 🗺️ Roadmap Overview

| Phase | Duration | Focus |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Months 1–2 | Foundations Sprint |
| 2 | Months 3–4 | AI & Perception Deep Dive |
| 3 | Months 5–6 | Hardware & Real Robot Build |
| 4 | Months 7–8 | Advanced AI (NVIDIA Ecosystem) |
| 5 | Months 9–10 | Research Paper (ICRA/IROS) |
| 6 | Months 11–12 | RaaS Startup Foundation |

---

## 📁 Phase 1 — Foundations Sprint
**Duration:** Months 1–2 (~15 hrs/week)

**Goals:**
- Solidify math fundamentals (linear algebra, calculus, probability)
- Build Python fluency for robotics and ML
- Intro to robotics kinematics and control (Stanford CS223A)
- First steps in deep learning (fast.ai)

**Key Resources:**
- [Stanford CS223A — Introduction to Robotics](https://see.stanford.edu/Course/CS223A)
- [fast.ai — Practical Deep Learning](https://course.fast.ai)
- [MIT OCW 18.06 — Linear Algebra](https://ocw.mit.edu/courses/18-06sc-linear-algebra-fall-2011/)
- [Articulated Robotics (YouTube)](https://www.youtube.com/@ArticulatedRobotics)

---

## 📁 Phase 2 — AI & Perception Deep Dive
**Duration:** Months 3–4

**Goals:**
- Computer vision fundamentals (OpenCV, feature detection, segmentation)
- Deep learning for perception (CNNs, object detection, depth estimation)
- Intro to sensor fusion (camera + LiDAR)

**Key Resources:**
- [learnopencv.com](https://learnopencv.com)
- [fast.ai Part 2](https://course.fast.ai)
- PyTorch official tutorials

---

## 📁 Phase 3 — Hardware & Real Robot Build
**Duration:** Months 5–6

**Goals:**
- ROS2 Jazzy — nodes, topics, services, transforms
- Build or simulate a real robot (differential drive / arm)
- Deploy a perception pipeline on hardware

**Key Resources:**
- [ROS2 Official Docs](https://docs.ros.org/en/jazzy/)
- [The Construct — ROS2 courses](https://www.theconstruct.ai)
- [Articulated Robotics ROS2 series](https://www.youtube.com/@ArticulatedRobotics)

---

## 📁 Phase 4 — Advanced AI (NVIDIA Ecosystem)
**Duration:** Months 7–8

**Goals:**
- NVIDIA Isaac ROS / Isaac Sim
- CUDA programming basics
- Deploying models with TensorRT
- Jetson edge deployment

**Key Resources:**
- [NVIDIA Isaac](https://developer.nvidia.com/isaac)
- [NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/training/)
- CUDA C++ Programming Guide

---

## 📁 Phase 5 — Research Paper
**Duration:** Months 9–10

**Target Venues:** ICRA 2026 / IROS 2026

**Goals:**
- Identify a novel research problem (perception, manipulation, or navigation)
- Implement, experiment, and benchmark
- Write and submit a full paper

---

## 📁 Phase 6 — RaaS Startup Foundation
**Duration:** Months 11–12

**Goals:**
- Define a Robotics-as-a-Service problem worth solving
- Build an MVP prototype
- Draft a pitch deck and business model

---

## 🛠️ Dev Environment

| Tool | Version |
|---|---|
| OS | Ubuntu 24.04 (WSL2) |
| GPU | NVIDIA RTX 3050 Laptop |
| CUDA | 13.0 |
| Python | 3.11 (conda env: `robotics`) |
| PyTorch | 2.12.1+cu130 |
| OpenCV | 4.13.0 |
| ROS2 | Jazzy (Phase 3) |
